text: On .NET 11 the OpenAPI document is generated by Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi and Swagger UI is no longer in the template. The post walks Bearer JWT, OAuth2 authorization code with PKCE, and OpenID Connect via discovery, with a per-operation transformer for mixed schemes plus the gotchas: null Components, casing-sensitive Reference.Id, and OAuth redirects under a path base.

The official ModelContextProtocol 1.2 C# SDK turns any method into an agent tool with [McpServerToolType] and [McpServerTool]. A working stdio server on .NET 11 in under 50 lines, exposing SQLite to Claude Code. Plus the stderr logging trick that keeps default ILogger from corrupting the JSON-RPC stream.
